summary.original: Design, critique, route, and implement Gantt charts and schedule visualizations. Use when the user mentions Gantt charts, project schedules, roadmaps with task spans, milestones, dependencies, predecessors, critical path, baselines, WBS, resource plans, capacity timelines, MS Project, Primavera P6, Jira Advanced Roadmaps, GitHub Projects, Smartsheet, monday.com, Asana, ClickUp, Azure DevOps iterations, or importing/exporting project-management data for a timeline chart.

description.original: Design, critique, route, and implement Gantt charts and schedule visualizations. Use when the user mentions Gantt charts, project schedules, roadmaps with task spans, milestones, dependencies, predecessors, critical path, baselines, WBS, resource plans, capacity timelines, MS Project, Primavera P6, Jira Advanced Roadmaps, GitHub Projects, Smartsheet, monday.com, Asana, ClickUp, Azure DevOps iterations, or importing/exporting project-management data for a timeline chart. description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
原始 SKILL.md 保持不变；译文已逐节审校，并保留 frontmatter keys、代码块、命令、路径、链接和不可翻译的技术术语。
